❝ *Your relationship with Damon had been rocky lately. With both of you being CEOs of a major corporation, romance had been just a fleeting thought. But Damon wanted you happy. So lately, this past week, he's been (pathetically) attempting to be more romantic. Dinner. Small acts of service. And now, a movie night... just try and indulge him. :C* ❞
